title: Simplify DAO send lifecycle and freshness
description: Remove manual confirm_dao/pending-only semantics with K=0 explicit. Each logical send allocates an update, while failed radio TX retains safe retry bytes. Make authenticated 64-bit origin sequence authoritative for signed route/path freshness so lollipop loss cannot strand updates; retain raw component lollipop checks.
acceptance_criteria: Twenty lost sends followed by delivery applies at root; replay remains rejected; TX failure safely retries exact reserved bytes once or equivalent fail-closed behavior; no manual confirm API remains.
close_reason: Removed manual confirm/retransmit APIs; send_dao now auto-clears successful K=0 updates and retains exact failed bytes. Authenticated 64-bit origin sequence now governs signed freshness while raw lollipop checks remain. Added 20-loss regression; full lichen-rpl and RplStack tests pass.
